reasoning: Anthropic recently closed a massive $3.5 billion private funding round in February 2025 at a valuation of $61.5 billion. It is highly irregular for a company to announce an IPO mere months after such a huge private capital raise. A comprehensive search across major financial media outlets (WSJ, Bloomberg, Reuters, CNBC, The Information) reveals no rumors, leaks, or reports of Anthropic hiring investment bankers or preparing a confidential S-1. Furthermore, multiple recent stock analysis pieces specifically highlight that Anthropic has no plans to go public and has not filed an S-1. With only six weeks remaining until the July 1, 2025 deadline, the probability of an unexpected S-1 filing or official IPO announcement on their news page is extremely low.
